subject: FW: Screening room plan and imagery
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Warwick Wicksman [mailto:warwick_wicksman@gensler.com] 
Sent: Monday, November 26, 2007 11:27 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Cc: Doug Schoettle; Irwin Miller; Andy Cohen; Patti Deckett
Subject: RE: Screening room plan and imagery


Hi Lesley,
It's been over a month since we sent these revised images to Mr.
Epstein.  Has he had a chance to review them yet?  We would like to
complete our design package, but we need his feedback.
Thanks,
Warwick

________________________________

From: Warwick Wicksman 
Sent: Friday, October 19, 2007 11:43 AM
To: 'Lesley Groff'
Cc: 'Doug Schoettle'; Irwin Miller
Subject: Screening room plan and imagery



Lesley,

The attached revised images and plan are for Mr. Epstein's review for
the Screening Room at the Island.  These files include some new
reference images for furniture and finishes.  We would appreciate some
initial feedback from Mr. Epstein before we complete the revised design
package.

Thanks,

Warwick Wicksman
